input[type=\"checkbox\"].background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-rotation), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-width)), repeating-linear-gradient(calc(90deg + var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-rotation)), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-width))

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(111, 73, 174) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"search\"].background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-rotation), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-width)), repeating-linear-gradient(calc(90deg + var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-rotation)), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2), var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-color-2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent var(--flexcyon-editor-bg-width))

kbd.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: oklch(0.636083 0.0886418 200.983 / 0.225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.--ec-codeSelBg:
color-mix(
    in oklch shorter hue,
    #D3D3CE 20%,
    transparent
  )
pre.--ec-uiSelBg:
color-mix(
    in oklch shorter hue,
    #D3D3CE 20%,
    transparent
  )
pre.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
